info.title: GoNext API
info.description: OpenAPI 3.1 description of the GoNext core HTTP API. This is the scaffold delivered by issue #29 — only the identity endpoint (GET /) is described concretely. Resource sections for posts, pages, users, and comments are reserved with empty schemas and will be filled in by subsequent issues that ship the corresponding handlers (see docs/05-admin-api.md §3 for the canonical surface design).

tags.name: posts
tags.description: Post content type. Reserved — handlers not yet shipped.

tags.name: pages
tags.description: Page content type. Reserved — handlers not yet shipped.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User accounts and profiles. Reserved — handlers not yet shipped.

tags.name: comments
tags.description: Comment threads. Reserved — handlers not yet shipped.

get.description: Returns the server identity payload: name, version, and commit. This is the only endpoint shipped by issue #2 (root handler) and is the concrete example for this scaffold.

Identity.description: Server identity returned by GET /. Mirrors the JSON written by apps/api/cmd/server/main.go.

name.description: Service name. Always 'gonext' for this binary.

version.description: Semantic version string injected at build time (defaults to 'dev').

commit.description: Git commit SHA the binary was built from (defaults to 'unknown').

type.description: A URI reference identifying the problem type.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence.

fields.description: Per-field validation errors keyed by field name.

trace_id.description: Server-side trace ID for correlating logs.

_PostsPlaceholder.description: Reserved — see docs/05-admin-api.md §3.1 for the canonical Post resource shape. Will be populated when the posts handler issue lands.

_PagesPlaceholder.description: Reserved — see docs/05-admin-api.md §3.1 for the canonical Page resource shape. Will be populated when the pages handler issue lands.

_UsersPlaceholder.description: Reserved — see docs/05-admin-api.md §3.1 for the canonical User resource shape. Will be populated when the users handler issue lands.

_CommentsPlaceholder.description: Reserved — see docs/05-admin-api.md §3.1 for the canonical Comment resource shape. Will be populated when the comments handler issue lands.

BadRequest.description: Malformed request: invalid JSON, missing required fields, or values that fail validation.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication required or the supplied credentials are invalid/expired.

WWW-Authenticate.description: Which auth schemes the server will accept.

Forbidden.description: The caller is authenticated but lacks the capability required for this operation.

NotFound.description: Resource not found, or not visible to the caller.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the caller may retry.

InternalError.description: Unexpected server error. Includes a trace_id for log correlation.

CookieSession.name: __Host-gn_session
CookieSession.description: Admin-UI cookie session. HTTPOnly, SameSite=Lax, signed with HMAC. Paired with the __Host-gn_csrf double-submit token + X-CSRF-Token header on mutating requests.

BearerJWT.description: Short-lived (15m) JWT access token used by first-party scripts, CLIs, and the dashboard's API client. Refreshed via POST /api/v1/auth/refresh.

ApplicationPassword.description: WordPress-compatible Application Password (HTTP Basic) for programmatic clients that already speak the WP REST API. Backed by long-lived API keys stored hashed in Postgres.

Cursor.name: cursor
Cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor, as returned in the previous response's page.next / page.prev.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Maximum number of items to return.
